description: Four-tier SNT-TC-1A responsibility ladder rising left-to-right: TRAINEE (small figure tethered to certified hard-hat silhouette, plaque DIRECT SUPERVISION ONLY), LEVEL I (card PERFORM & RECORD inside amber WRITTEN INSTRUCTION boundary box), LEVEL II (card INTERPRET & EVALUATE + open code-book glyph), LEVEL III (card APPROVE PROCEDURES / TRAIN & EXAMINE). Glowing INTERPRETATION threshold line between Level I and Level II; dashed climb route draws on first. Whole ladder dimly visible by default; reveals light tiers. Method-agnostic — MT/PT/RT/ET/RAD certification-levels lessons converge here. Alternate-lesson id: lvLevel3 (lit Level III layer) — exists hidden, NEVER revealed in ut1-1-3 where Level III stays dim context. Lower-right kept clear for note chip.
